inferenceUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible endpoint for lesson extraction (your local Qwen3 node).

inferenceApiKey.description: API key for inference endpoint. Use 'none' for local servers.

dbPath.description: Path to the SQLite database for lesson storage.

inferenceUrl.label: Inference URL
inferenceUrl.help: OpenAI-compatible endpoint for local lesson extraction (your Qwen3 node).

inferenceModel.help: Model name used for lesson extraction after each agent run.

maxLessonsInPrompt.label: Max Lessons in Prompt
maxLessonsInPrompt.help: Maximum number of SIS lessons to inject before each agent run.

minConfidenceToInject.label: Min Confidence to Inject
minConfidenceToInject.help: Minimum lesson confidence score (0-1) required for injection.
